paper_analysis.summary: This paper reports the first experimental synthesis of free-standing 2D B2S2 nanosheets and combines it with first-principles calculations to study structure, band gap, vibrational signatures, lithium adsorption, and photoluminescence properties.
paper_analysis.processed_plot_details: The paper likely relies on experimental characterization data and first-principles computational results, but no explicit dataset, source data, or supplementary data location was provided in the available information.
